docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AUTO SALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
